expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜各部分的大小。 [Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 表示总的测量大小，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total measurement, [BoardThick] is top, bottom and side board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is background board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran jumlah, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือตัววัดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นบน ล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng cộng, [BoardThick] là độ dày của chất liệu ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của chất liệu ván nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang laki ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng ibabaw, ilalim at gilid ng tabla, ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng likod na tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အဲဒီ 📐 အချင်းချင်း (🤔 ဒီပြန်မှုကိုဖြုပုံမြန်ဆန်သည်)ittart.
